findings.title: Path mismatch causes test/implementation divergence
findings.description: _load_skill_frontmatter reads P:/.claude/skills/{skill}/SKILL.md while _validate_skill_frontmatter reads STATE_DIR/skills/{skill}/SKILL.md. Tests patch STATE_DIR but not hardcoded P:/.claude/skills.

evidence.code_excerpt: skill_dir = Path(P:/.claude/skills) vs skill_dir = STATE_DIR / skills
evidence.proof: Tests only test _validate_skill_frontmatter in isolation. Never test full set_skill_loaded() flow.

impact.business_consequence: Validation uses wrong path at runtime, bypassing checks

recommendation.action: Add integration test patching both STATE_DIR and P:/.claude/skills paths
recommendation.code_fix: Test set_skill_loaded() with both paths mocked
